untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'base-building period' and 'emerging from base (15-20 days post-breakout with continuous strength)'. These require pattern recognition (support level identification, breakout detection, and multi-bar strength confirmation) which cannot be expressed with single-bar indicators and simple operators. The 'relative strength' mentioned in source text refers to momentum/strength ranking, approximated here as RSI>=80, but the base-emergence timing and continuous strength validation cannot be properly encoded.
translation_notes: Used RSI_14>=80 as proxy for 'high relative strength'. Used price_pos_20 (position within 20-day range) to approximate extension thresholds: <=0.15 for within 15% extension, >=0.25 for 25% extension trigger. Price crossing below SMA_20 approximates 'closes below the base with volume confirmation' (volume confirmation cannot be strictly encoded). The core pattern-based conditions (base identification and emergence window) remain untranslatable with available indicators.
